review_text: We have stayed here in our caravan once before, the location is conveniently close to town, pubs restaurants etc, we have a 9.5m caravan and find the sites very tight to get into, site 42 was out best hope, hitched up we are 16m long so it was an effort. If you have a smaller rig or motorhome you would love the site, amenities are clean, staff very helpful, if you have e kids the River and water park are accross the road.

I’m tight about accommodation costs so I was pleasantly surprised to get a cabin sleeping 4, that was dog friendly, linen & towels supplied all within walking distance to town in the school holidays for $140! Bargain! Shared amenities were close to cabin, clean and easy to access. Definitely will be coming back here again.

Had a wonderful few days at Reflections Ballina Holiday Park on a powered site. Very neat and tidy park. Within walking distance to water, shops and restaurants and other scenic walks. Clean shower and toilet block. Excellent friendly and helpful staff. Would definitely recommend and would stay here again. Excellent kitchen and laundry facilities. Very quiet park.

Amazing staff, so helpful at check in and check out. Cabin was very clean, spacious and private. Enclosed outdoor area was perfect to ensure our little deaf escape artist ( Toy Poodle) remained safe.  Great location so close to the main town with heaps of options to eat and enjoy fab coffee.
Amazing dog friendly camping and craving across the road from an off leash dog beach on the banks of the Richmond River.   An easy walk from the centre of town as well.

Horrible noise from cars passing by 24 hours a day. Really small sites. My neighbor need to wake me up in the night to get out. I had to pack up everything, parking my RV at the street and then coming back and build up everything again. So far our worst site since two months of camping at the East Coast.

A great little park, conveniently located within walking distance to woolworths, cafes and restaurants. Dog beach and swimming across the road and lovely staff and maintenance guys who take pride in the park and amenities. The only negative is the site sizes... you literally can't swing a cat and our van is only 18ft! We were in the middle of two other vans towed by dual cab utes and we couldn't all park at the front of our sites. We had to nose our car in partly under the awning if we wanted to park on our site. If one of the 3 wanted to go somewhere in the car, it was a constant shuffle moving cars about. It was honestly the only negative, but annoying enough that we'd likely book one of the other parks if coming back to Ballina. It feels terrible leaving this review as everything else was fantastic, but if you're towing a big van or have a big tow vehicle, its important for an honest review. A re-zone of sites to give a little extra wiggle room would see us happily return.
Perfect little park with the river across the road.

We were in our caravan.
Beautiful location, plenty of beach areas. Take a lovely walk to the end of jetty, watching the dolphins, eagles and hundreds of water dragons.

Very close to town. Clean, well presented and quiet.
Large sites.
Across the road from the river inlet.

The cabin was perfect for our stay.. clean, modern and had everything we needed.. the little verandah bit was an added bonus and being all closed in made it very safe and secure for our dog. Staff we encountered were super friendly and even had the air con on in our cabin when we arrived. Being close to the calm water was also great. |Thankyou and we can’t wait to return
Old structure of the cabin needs some TLC. Main door lock didn't work! WiFi promised but never worked! Very congested esp work lot of permanent dwellings. Will never visit here again...

Stayed for 1 night 19/09/25
Couple with 1 dog.
Cabin 21, lovely clean cabin.
Comfortable large size bed.
Nice verandah with gate for dog.
Went to visit friends staying there. Place looked very good and it would be an enjoyable place to spend some holiday time. Staff friendly and very clean.
We were there during some very poor weather. The sites were not waterlogged, handling heavy rain pretty well.  Access can be a bit tight. Even though it's on the main road, it was surprisingly quiet.
Extremely small park with tight parking for caravans
Lovely clean cabin with all that was required. Comfy bed and very quiet location. Great location for doing the walking paths and walking into town for dinner. Highly recommend
Only stayed one night, but could have stayed longer. Nice little park, beautiful views, friendly staff and friendly locals. Nice amenities, lovely atmosphere. Would happily go back 😍

After travelling from Victoria and staying the previous 3 nights at parks we had pre booked a couple months before, we arrived at Ballina Reflections to be told we didn’t have a booking.   We were told that we had already stayed there a couple of months before!!!   No amount of talking could make the woman understand that, no, we had not already been there.   We were just on our way to the Sunshine now.  She did say we could stay there but we would have to pay again!!!!    Needless to say, we went elsewhere.   I’ve never had such bad customer service in my life.  Careful if you book there!!

The best place brilliantly close to shops short walking distance to all shops cafes Woolies
Straight across road to off leash beach Bay Area
Great scenery in and around Ballina with a huge rsl club just up the road from park
Outstanding service at the park !!! Amenities spotless !! Card use in laundry which is do much easier than carrying coins !
Well done e reflections Ballina !!
Good value clean and well positioned to river and town

What a fantastic, spacious cabin. Large bed, great shower room, and kitchen had all the amenities. We parked right outside. |There is no need to bring anything. It was spotlessly clean with a hair dryer, iron, etc. Located a five minute walk into the town and opposite the river. It was also very quiet. As a campsite, it seemed to offer all the washing facing launderette. We would definitely stay here again.|One star dropped because we couldn't get any hot water in the shower, and we needed to leave as the staff were arriving. The lady in reception was very apologetic and went off to source the problem.|

We have stayed at this Caravan Park many times.  The location of the park is in walking distance to town, waterside and parks.  The reception staff are friendly and accommodating.  On this stay (of 4 days) however the amenities were far from clean, based on the floor at doors, the shower and toilets they had dirty/rubbish from previous days still present.  For the price you pay per night  now I think it is reasonable to the amenities (albiet not new) are kept in better state of cleanliness.

Always a great stay here at Reflections.
The team are incredibly accommodating

They’ve combined some sites to make large sites, location for us with our dog was excellent with dog beach across the road.
Managers were very friendly and helpful.
Recommended.
$55 for a caravan site for 1 person for 1 night off peak. Too expensive!

Nice park, very clean , great staff.
Fantastic location for shops fishing biking and walking.
Sites a bit tight I was fine with my campervan.
Pool Opposite

We had a fantastic stay at Ballina Reflections Caravan Park! The park was spotless — everything from the amenities to the grounds was incredibly well-maintained. The staff were so lovely and welcoming, always happy to help with a smile. The location is perfect, right in the heart of beautiful Ballina, with easy access to the river, beaches, and local shops. Such a peaceful, scenic spot to relax and explore the town. It’s one of the dog friendliest places we have visited also. So many places to take the dogs including into restaurant’s. Highly recommend and can’t wait to return!
Love this place.. clean.  Friendly.. great bbqs

Average accommodation. Bed was very hard which effect our sleep along with the cabin  being situated beside a busy main road  which was extremely noisy & it wasn’t school holidays. The plus side was that we were in walking distance of the shops & cafes. I felt it was over priced for what you received.
Nice small comfortable powered site away from the hurly burly. Very good facilities and neatly kept.

10/10! Super clean cabin, well equipped and enough space for us 2 and our dog. Great to have dog friendly facilities like this! Fantastic location and friendly staff. Very grateful for the late check-out so we could browse the local Sunday farmers markets (just around the corner!) without a rush. Will definitely come again!! Also, bonus points for proper toilet paper, never have I ever stayed anywhere with WGAC toilet paper, loved this!!

Best location with cleanest amenities, very sociable park close to everything you could want, shops, beaches, boatramp, etc Would definitely reccomend this parkk to all and sundry as a great family park with dogs all well behaved. Definitely  coming back if i can get in.

Convenient place to stop overnight, around 4-5 km off highway.
Has camp kitchen, bathroom clean, large toilet area.  Small sites.
Has activities during school holidays.
Pets allowed here.
Woolworths 500 m away. Opposite waterslide park.Opposite river where people are fishing with nice sunsets.
Absolutely love this park. The deluxe pet friendly cabin was spotless and everything is new. Definitely a new fave spot for the family holiday.
Only in for 1 night this trip and very impressed with location  staff are friendly and we are a great site. ☺️

Been coming here for years and the location is so close to everything. We have been passing on information to other travellers about the friendly staff and we have seen a lot come and go and the ambience of the facilities  with background of the local radio station playing great songs was always the highlight of our stay. For some unknown reason they have stopped playing the music. It has put a dampner on if we will come back again  but I will ask this question before I book again. Please don't let this stop anyone from coming to this great park.

Hi my wife and I were looking for somewhere to stay last weekend in Ballina. We thought we'd try a cabin for a change.
My wife went to  reception to check on prices and came out quite shocked.
They wanted to charge us $275.00 for the night  we could've stayed at the Mantra for $270.00 or river view for $$290.00, you work it out as I believe it was bloody expensive.
Need to say we tried the Discovery Park Caravan and Cabins.
We stayed in a cabin for two, cost $133.00. Absolutely clean and tidy. What more could you ask for

Sorry Reflections but nah, your expectations are too high. Unless you do massages and beauty care included in the price

We pulled up in our caravan looking for a place that was convenient to the beach and the city, we found it here at Reflections Ballina, beach is across the road, water park for the kids at your doorstep and the city is a 5 min stroll up the street with lots of pubs for a meal and drink along with easy shopping. I highly recommend this place to stay, clean bathrooms and plenty of room to park.

The park is well maintained and facilities that we could access clean. I couldn’t get anyone to answer the phone to advise them we would arrive after 6pm when the office closed.  After 20 mins on hold the second time I was given the option to leave a message. The person who responded was rude and told me they couldn’t answer as they were busy calling late arrivals. Go figure.  Laundry was closed from 5pm so was not available to me. Maybe just a bad day.

Has very nice cabins available
le and great for pets lots of lovely walks and close to the water
Great deals and awesome work on the resort

Powered Van Site , Site was very small and clustered with other vans while campers and small vans had more open sites , Service and amenities where very good , Position of the park is brilliant, Dog friendly beach and walk ways just over the road , Overall a great park that the modern Caravans have outgrown ,
정말 좋은 경험이었어요. 제가 늦게 도착했는데도 자리를 제공하고 다음날 계산하도록 도와줬어요. 리셉션 직원분들이 정말 친절하세요. 오전, 오후 담당 분들 모두요. 그리고 화장실과 샤워실, 식당이 매우 깔끔했습니다. 좋은 냄새가 났어요. 여행의 첫 캠핑장이었는데 시작을 좋게 만들어줬어요.👍

Recently we had a car accident near Ballina and the only accommodation we could find was at Reflections Caravan park.  Unlucky for us -  we were charged $348.00 for one night.  The cabin was comfortable, the view was lovely but the price was outrageous.

Stayed 2 nights with our dog. Very clean and tidy self contained cabin.
Great staff.
Good price.
Only have to walk 100 meters to have big grassy area or to the river with your pet.
Would recommend to any one
Very good spot we had.Very clean
After a 1 night stay our cabin was immaculate so clean  great location ,friendly staff , great for pets we had 2 small dogs not a problem housekeeping need a pat on thr back great job
Very friendly staff and a lovely well laid out park in a great location.  Price per night for a powered site for a person on a pension a little high.
Caravan parking on sites,s can be challenging but awesome following folk always someone to help you get into spot

We had two nights in a self contained cabin at the very reasonable price of $118 per night during NSW school holidays.  We found no fault with our stay.  The cabin was immaculately clean, had everything we needed including cooking utensils, crockery etc, a large fridge, comfy sofa and outdoor verandah with bistro table and chairs.  The bed linen and towels were all clean and not worn at all, the bed was comfortable and the shower was good (if small).  Although our cabin was next to the road, we had a very quiet stay.  The staff were helpful and welcoming. We walked everywhere - to the beaches, the RSL club, the supermarket etc.  It’s a great location opposite the swimming pool and waterslides.  We would definitely stay here again if we’re in Ballina.
One of the best on suite sites been on, staff were very good, no problems at all. Price very reasonable for time of year. Thank you all
Very nice park, clean, well maintained, cabins good, staff friendly, close to river and waterslides. Highly recommend

Absolutely amazing!
Dee was so lovely and welcoming, she made me want to come back again.
Clean, quiet, I can't praise it enough.
Expensive, but people keep going back. ????
Nice litttle park walking distance to main street. Great facilites kept really clean and in good condition.  Friendly staff.

Very helpful staff, extremely clean and well maintained park. Amenities were immaculate and it was lovely to have large shower stalls where your clothes don’t get wet. Although van sites are small, everyone was very respectful of each others space. Love that you can bring your dogs even in peak times. Walk to town and lovely dog friendly beach across the road.
Great spot. Very welll run.
Great place beach off lead across the road. Walk to everything. Sites priceybut worth it 50 60 per sitepower.
Clean and well maintained! Near to Balina Waterslide. Near to river. Saw some dolphins swam across the river.

Absolutely beautiful.
Everything clean. Being a professional cleaner myself I was very impressed.
Staff ever so accommodating. Cabin modern an perfect.
Very reasonable rates.
Fantastic location.
I can not say enough about this beautiful park.  We had a small Cabin with out a bathroom however price reflects that, the bathrooms where just across the way. Cabin small not too small, again price reflects that.
Our cabin was beautiful. You can cook, a 2 burner stove top a microwave, small fridge with small freezer, very, very clean like new. Camp kitchen available in park.
A quiet park. Just lovely.
We had a powered site.  Very well maintained park but be mindful of the trees with your height, otherwise great spot 👍
I had a powered sites. All level. Clean amenities & camp kitchen.  Close to boat ramp. Walk to shops.  All staff very good.
